title: Beef's Metal Blocks
description: A vanilla friendly expansion for Minecraft's metal blocks!
body:
# Beef's Metal Blocks
Beef's Metal Blocks is a vanilla friendly mod that aims to expand minecrafts metal blocks!

![Full expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed3030be3fdfb54dc273cf6a9800dff615b71393_0.webp)

This mod is a comprehensive expanded suite of all the metal blocks, retaining variations of all vanilla textures. Finally you can have that regal palace or that shiny shiny kitchen!

Disclaimer: some recipes have been changed.


## About
Copper trapdoors are now crafted like iron trapdoors and metal trapdoor recipes give you 2 of them.

![trapdoor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9188106bcf73b5cc08b63d592fbfbfe7d753a3c4.png)

All metal blocks now default to the copper texture (smooth) and are referred to in game as x_block. You can swap any of these textures by putting the block into a stone cutter, and all of the textured blocks (excluding cut) will return your resources if you put it into a crafting grid by itself. 

![stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e01ba9c804ce5ad0525155f2169f57c13557cf.png)

You can also swap the block type by making a stick formation in your inventory. The rotation is smooth(copper) -> polished(gold) - > reinforced(iron).

![blocktype change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2870c0b2f29d27dec6ae4135041111c3d776e417.png)

Did I mention all the solid gold and iron blocks are beacon compatible?

![Beacon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da31687153932353f2faf1cbc940303de498466d_0.webp)

## Modpacks
You may use this mod in your modpack as long as you credit.


## Contact Me
Please reach out to me on The Fabric Project Discord if you have any requests for features or want to report bugs. My tag is @beefymuscle.

Big thanks to The Fabric Project Discord. They are so kind to amateur developers like myself.

Philippians 4:13 
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
